name: Agency Group — Google Maps Commercial & Hotel Scraper
description: Scrapes Google Maps to identify hotels, quintas, commercial buildings, and guesthouses across target cities for off-market sourcing

output_schema.description: Google Maps results normalized for off-market ingestion

normalization_transform.description: n8n Code node — Google Maps result normalization

target_cities.coverage_notes: Focus on hospitality assets (hotels, quintas, guest houses) and commercial buildings suitable for conversion

schedule_description: Run weekly on Sunday 05:00 — hotels/commercial properties change ownership less frequently

qualification_signals.description: Indicators of motivated or available sellers found via Google Maps
signals: Permanently closed business (still listed, owner may want to sell)
Low review count + old last review = inactive business
Listed as hotel/B&B but no bookings found on OTA (Booking.com, Airbnb)
Old business registration + single owner family name
Near new infrastructure (metro, highway) → land value appreciation signal
